## Phase 20 Acceptance Hardening Queue

| gate_id | gate_name | blocked_strategies | blocker_rows | blocker_categories | evidence_sources_present | evidence_sources_missing | priority_rank | work_package_focus | acceptance_milestone | dependency_note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| G04_risk | Risk gate | 11 | 11 | risk_sample_proxy_only | 11 | 0 | 1 | WP8 | full_lifecycle_acceptance_risk_run | Requires full lifecycle risk state over generated trades, daily equity curves, position exposure, halt behavior and tail-loss summaries. |
| G02_economic | Economic gate | 11 | 11 | economic_proxy_or_negative_net_return | 11 | 0 | 2 | WP8/WP10 | broker_reconciled_full_run_economic_validation | Requires full event/tick execution P&L, Zerodha rupee cost formulas, slippage stress and broker contract-note reconciliation where available. |
| G01_predictive | Predictive gate | 11 | 11 | predictive_proxy_or_weak_signal | 11 | 0 | 3 | WP9/WP10 | multi_seed_predictive_validation | Requires calibrated model outputs, baseline comparisons, multi-seed synthetic runs and later multi-day real holdout. |
| G03_robustness | Robustness gate | 11 | 11 | robustness_smoke_only | 11 | 0 | 4 | WP9/WP10 | full_registry_robustness_execution | Requires full required-seed execution, walk-forward folds, parameter-neighborhood smoothness, holdout-generator reruns and real-data reruns. |
| G05_realism | Realism gate | 6 | 6 | realism_warning_or_proxy_support | 6 | 0 | 5 | WP10 | holdout_generator_strategy_rerun | Requires strategy reruns on holdout generator configurations with feed imperfections and pessimistic execution controls. |

| M01_broker_external_reconciliation | 1 | Broker/exchange fill provenance and contract-note/cost reconciliation prerequisites. | 44 | 2 | 11 | 3 | 1 | 11 | 33 | 0 | 0 | 1 | Capture or import broker/exchange order/fill events and reconcile lifecycle states to those records where available. |
| M02_strategy_support_and_registry_closure | 2 | Close unsupported or partial strategy feature, module and registry coverage before acceptance reruns. | 28 | 3 | 11 | 3 | 2 | 16 | 12 | 9 | 0 | 45 | Implement missing required features/modules or explicitly classify the strategy as research-only before predictive promotion. |

| M04_full_seed_walk_forward_and_robustness_execution | 4 | Run full seed, walk-forward, parameter-neighborhood, execution-profile and negative-control robustness tests. | 66 | 2 | 11 | 6 | 3 | 49 | 17 | 0 | 0 | 139 | Execute the Phase 13 seed plan and walk-forward windows for predictive models without test reuse. |
| M05_full_lifecycle_risk_and_economic_replay | 5 | Run full event/lifecycle risk, guardrail, slippage, tail-risk and risk-adjusted economic acceptance replays. | 121 | 2 | 11 | 8 | 2 | 101 | 20 | 0 | 0 | 205 | Run the full event/tick lifecycle engine for every supported strategy/profile/fill model with preserved order and fill lineage. |
| M06_holdout_generator_and_realism_reruns | 6 | Rerun strategies on holdout generator profiles, feed imperfections, pessimistic execution and artifact controls. | 47 | 2 | 11 | 6 | 3 | 29 | 18 | 0 | 0 | 326 | Run strategies on holdout-generator outputs and compare against calibration/development results. |
| M07_real_multiday_acceptance_validation | 7 | Validate surviving candidates on diagnostically sound multi-day real data holdouts. | 39 | 4 | 11 | 4 | 1 | 0 | 39 | 0 | 0 | 373 | Run economic validation on multi-day real data and/or untouched holdout-generator configurations before promotion. |

| 1 | P1 | S01 | runnable_proxy | priority | tail_loss_validation | 8 | tail_risk_validation | internal_tail_risk_replay_plus_acceptance_thresholds | 1pct tail trade loss within current limit and no tail breach under current profile | 36 sensitivity rows; all_profile_pass_rows=4; high_limit_rows=26 | proxy_tail_loss_sensitivity_available_not_acceptance | True | False | proxy_evidence_needs_acceptance_upgrade | Tail-loss sensitivity is proxy-only and does not prove acceptance-grade tail behavior under broker/exchange fills. | Compute tail-loss distribution from acceptance lifecycle fills and current/strict limit profiles. | breach_rows=9; high_breach_rows=6; proxy_pass_rows=0; current_limit_pass_rows=0; any_limit_pass_rows=4 | 9.0 | 6.0 | 0.0 | 0.0 | 4.0 | 26.0 | 1.0 | 901.9562482045282 | 2667.279362420556 | False | outputs/phase12/full_run_lifecycle_risk_summary.csv; outputs/phase12/full_run_lifecycle_daily_risk_summary.csv; outputs/phase12/full_run_lifecycle_risk_breach_severity.csv; outputs/phase12/full_run_lifecycle_risk_limit_sensitivity.csv; outputs/phase12_order_lifecycle/risk_control_summary.csv |

## Phase 20 M01 Broker Evidence Contract

| evidence_file_id | expected_path | evidence_domain | required_for_gate | minimum_rows_policy | acceptance_role | file_exists_now | current_status | next_action |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| broker_order_fill_events | external_broker_evidence/broker_order_fill_events.csv | broker_exchange_fill_provenance | G04_risk;G02_economic | one row per broker/exchange order or fill event used in validation | Maps strategy decisions and simulated lifecycle states to broker/exchange order and fill records. | False | external_evidence_missing | place evidence file at external_broker_evidence/broker_order_fill_events.csv |
| broker_contract_note_charges | external_broker_evidence/broker_contract_note_charges.csv | contract_note_cost_reconciliation | G04_risk;G02_economic | one row per contract-note order/charge component used in validation | Reconciles brokerage, STT, exchange transaction charges, SEBI charges, stamp duty, GST, total charges and net obligation. | False | external_evidence_missing | place evidence file at external_broker_evidence/broker_contract_note_charges.csv |
| strategy_order_linkage | external_broker_evidence/strategy_order_linkage.csv | strategy_to_broker_order_lineage | G04_risk;G02_economic | one row per strategy order decision linked to broker/exchange order IDs | Prevents orphan broker fills or synthetic orders from being counted in acceptance evidence. | False | external_evidence_missing | place evidence file at external_broker_evidence/strategy_order_linkage.csv |
| broker_reconciliation_tolerances | external_broker_evidence/broker_reconciliation_tolerances.csv | reconciliation_thresholds | G04_risk;G02_economic | one row per reconciliation metric and tolerance | Defines auditable tolerances before comparing broker records, contract notes and internal lifecycle P&L. | False | external_evidence_missing | place evidence file at external_broker_evidence/broker_reconciliation_tolerances.csv |

| broker_evidence_status | gate_id | rows | strategies | acceptance_met_rows |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| external_broker_evidence_missing | G02_economic | 11 | 11 | 0 |
| external_broker_evidence_missing | G04_risk | 22 | 11 | 0 |
| proxy_formula_available_external_broker_evidence_missing | G02_economic | 11 | 11 | 0 |

| broker_evidence_status | gate_id | rows |
| --- | --- | --- |
| external_broker_evidence_missing | G02_economic | 11 |
| external_broker_evidence_missing | G04_risk | 22 |

| test_id | test_description | acceptance_threshold | current_status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_lineage_join | broker_order_fill_events joins strategy_order_linkage on broker_order_id | zero orphan accepted validation fills | blocked_until_external_broker_evidence_imported |
| fill_quantity_match | filled quantities reconcile between broker records and internal lifecycle orders | zero unexplained quantity mismatch | blocked_until_external_broker_evidence_imported |
| average_price_match | broker average prices reconcile to internal fill prices within tolerance | all tested fills within tolerance | blocked_until_external_broker_evidence_imported |
| charge_component_match | contract-note charge components reconcile to Zerodha formula and internal costs | all charge components within predeclared tolerance | blocked_until_external_broker_evidence_imported |
| net_obligation_match | contract-note net obligation reconciles to internal realized cash-flow | all reconciled orders within predeclared tolerance | blocked_until_external_broker_evidence_imported |

| criterion_id | criterion_description | acceptance_threshold | current_status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| feature_product_coverage | Every required strategy feature is present in the acceptance feature product at the intended horizon. | all required features present; no proxy-only substitute for required acceptance feature | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| module_registry_decision | Every S01-S11 module has an explicit acceptance path or explicit research/risk-only exclusion. | no strategy has ambiguous support status | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| alpha_registry_scope | Only alpha strategies enter predictive/robustness promotion grids; non-alpha/risk filters are excluded from alpha promotion. | S10/S11 excluded or separately registered as execution/risk controls | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| support_evidence_lineage | Feature/module support decisions cite current artifacts and missing-feature lists. | every M02 row has evidence_source and required_next_evidence | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |

| criterion_id | criterion_description | acceptance_threshold | current_status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| calibrated_model_output | Frozen calibrated probability models exist for each candidate strategy and are evaluated out of sample. | model artifact/version present; Brier score and calibration curve computed out of sample | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| baseline_lift | Directional and probabilistic metrics beat no-skill, majority-direction and Brier baselines. | positive accuracy excess versus no-skill and majority baselines plus positive Brier skill | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| holdout_cell_stability | Predeclared holdout cells beat local-majority baselines without threshold reuse. | all minimum-row holdout cells pass | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| untouched_test_stability | Untouched-test cells pass after development is frozen. | all untouched-test cells beat local-majority baselines | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| feature_stability | Feature importance or attribution is stable across registered seeds/folds. | stable feature set and bounded importance volatility across seeds | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| promotion_falsification_clearance | Joined predictive promotion-falsification checklist clears all blockers. | predictive_promotion_candidate is true and falsification status is clear | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |

| criterion_id | criterion_description | acceptance_threshold | current_status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| full_validation_seed_coverage | Every candidate strategy is executed across the full registered Phase 13 validation seed plan. | executed_seed_count equals required_full_validation_seeds and no seed is reused for threshold tuning | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| walk_forward_execution | All predeclared train/test walk-forward windows are executed with leakage checks preserved. | walk_forward_windows_run equals walk_forward_windows_planned and train/test boundaries are unchanged | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| parameter_neighborhood_smoothness | The predeclared parameter neighborhood is run and summarized without selecting on final-test results. | parameter_sets_run equals parameter_sets_planned and neighborhood performance is not single-point fragile | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| execution_profile_robustness | Candidate strategies remain positive across deployable and stressed execution profiles using acceptance-grade fills and costs. | all deployable/stressed execution profiles pass after broker/cost reconciliation prerequisites are met | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| negative_control_rejection | Mandatory negative controls degrade or fail under the same full execution harness. | all interpretable mandatory negative controls reject/degrade versus BASE | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |

| criterion_id | criterion_description | acceptance_threshold | current_status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| strategy_full_run_coverage | Full event/tick lifecycle replay covers every supported strategy/profile/fill model. | all supported strategies have preserved order/fill lineage | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| daily_equity_curve_and_halt_coverage | Daily equity, halt, resume and blocked-trading state is persisted from the replay engine. | daily risk state is complete and reconciled to lifecycle fills | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| guardrail_validation | Daily loss, drawdown and position guardrails are enforced and validated on replay state. | no unresolved deployable guardrail breach before promotion | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| tail_loss_validation | Tail-loss distribution is computed from replay fills under current and strict profiles. | tail loss remains within approved capital limits | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| documented_cost_formula_validation | Documented Zerodha formula evidence is retained and reconciled to broker notes where available. | documented formula plus broker contract-note reconciliation clears | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| latency_slippage_acceptance_run | Latency/slippage stress is replayed through the event lifecycle engine. | retail and stressed profiles pass under calibrated latency/slippage | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| net_profitability_validation | Retail and stressed profiles remain net-positive after realistic costs. | retail/stress and stressed-only net profitability pass | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| risk_adjusted_economic_validation | Economic P&L and lifecycle risk state jointly pass. | risk-adjusted economic joint pass clears for deployable profiles | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |

| criterion_id | criterion_description | acceptance_threshold | current_status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| synthetic_quality_gate_clear | Synthetic quality gates remain green on the accepted generator version. | no fail rows and no unresolved warning rows | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| holdout_generator_coverage | Predeclared holdout generator profiles are structurally available. | holdout profiles cover required quarter/feed scenarios | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| feed_imperfection_coverage | Disconnect/stressed feed imperfections are present and used in reruns. | feed-imperfection profiles are rerun through full lifecycle execution | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| holdout_strategy_rerun | Candidate strategies are rerun on holdout-generator profiles. | strategy P&L/signal/risk reruns exist on Q-B/Q-C holdout profiles | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| pessimistic_execution_realism | Holdout reruns include stressed retail, partial-fill and pessimistic execution assumptions. | pessimistic execution rerun passes or blocks promotion | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| artifact_exploitation_rejection | Artifact/control reruns reject generator-specific edge. | negative controls show edge does not depend on synthetic artifacts | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |

| real_multiday_data_coverage | Multiple diagnostically sound real trading days are collected for each candidate strategy universe. | multi-day real L2 coverage with documented gaps and symbol coverage | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| real_multiday_predictive_holdout | Predictive results are rerun and stable on real multi-day holdout data. | real multi-day predictive baseline, calibration and stability pass | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| real_multiday_economic_validation | Economic P&L is validated on real multi-day or untouched holdout data with reconciled costs. | retail/stress economics remain positive after broker/fill/cost reconciliation | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| real_multiday_robustness_rerun | Robustness checks are rerun on multiple real days and compared to synthetic scenarios. | real multi-day strategy behavior is stable and not synthetic-specific | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
| real_multiday_realism_validation | Synthetic/holdout realism is checked against real multi-day strategy behavior. | real behavior matches accepted synthetic/holdout envelopes without artifact dependence | contract_defined_not_acceptance_evidence |
